meta.description: Tyrannic War Crusade rules — Battle Traits, Monster Hunters, Striding Behemoths, campaign, missions

characterUnits.BIO_ACID_BURNS: CHARACTER models have Feel No Pain 5+
characterUnits.NATURAL_LEADER: Can re-roll Battle-shock or Leadership tests
characterUnits.DEADLY_COMBATANT: All melee weapons have SUSTAINED HITS 1
characterUnits.DEATH_INCARNATE_AURA: While enemy within 6", worsen their Leadership by 1

vehicleUnits.FOCUSED_GUNNERS: No penalty to Hit rolls for ranged attacks while within Engagement Range of enemy
vehicleUnits.REINFORCED_SUPERSTRUCTURE: Attacks with Strength 7 or less — worsen AP by 1
vehicleUnits.AUTO_REPAIR_NODES: At start of Command phase, one model regains 1 lost wound

infantryUnits.RESOLUTE_VETERANS: +1 to Battle-shock, Leadership, and Desperate Escape tests
infantryUnits.HEADHUNTERS: At start of battle, select one enemy unit — re-roll Hit and Wound rolls of 1 against it

mountedUnits.HIGH_SPEED_GUNNERY: When Advancing, all ranged weapons have ASSAULT until end of turn
mountedUnits.MOUNTED_GUERRILLAS: Eligible to declare charge in turn it Fell Back
mountedUnits.ENCIRCLING_RAPTORS: In Strategic Reserves, count battle round as 1 higher for setting up
mountedUnits.TIRELESS_RAIDERS: Models can make ranged attacks even within Engagement Range — only against units in Engagement Range

stridingBehemothUnits.DESTRUCTIVE_IMPULSE: When destroying enemy unit, add twice as many marks to Tyrannic War Veteran tally
stridingBehemothUnits.RAPID_ADAPTATION: Select any one Monster Hunters Battle Honour regardless of existing ones — does not increase Crusade points or count toward Battle Honour maximum

upgradePath.GIANTSLAYERS: Re-roll Hit rolls of 1 when attacking MONSTER or VEHICLE
upgradePath.PAINFUL_LESSONS: When MONSTER or VEHICLE attacks this unit, worsen their AP by 1
upgradePath.INDOMITABLE_DEFIANCE: While within Engagement Range of MONSTER or VEHICLE, auto-pass Battle-shock and Leadership tests
upgradePath.HAMSTRINGING_ATTACKS: After shooting and MONSTER/VEHICLE lost wounds — subtract 2" from their Move and 2 from Charge rolls until next Shooting phase
upgradePath.NIMBLE_DEFENCE: Feel No Pain 5+ against attacks from MONSTER or VEHICLE units

monsterHuntersPath.unlocking: Earn 10 Tyrannic War Veteran points to progress. +1 per enemy unit destroyed. +3 per STRIDING BEHEMOTHS unit destroyed. +6 if TITANIC

upgradePath.THUNDEROUS_BLOWS: When destroying enemy unit, subtract 2 from their Out of Action test
upgradePath.UNSTOPPABLE_ADVANCE: When making Normal/Advance/Fall Back moves, can move through models and terrain (cannot end on top). No Desperate Escape tests when Falling Back through enemy
upgradePath.MASSIVE_STOMP: When selected to fight, before attacks — select non-MONSTER/VEHICLE enemy in Engagement Range. Roll D6: 2-5 = D3 mortal wounds, 6 = 3 mortal wounds
upgradePath.MONSTROUS_PRESENCE: Aura — while enemy within Engagement Range: -1 to their Leadership. Cannot use Insane Bravery Stratagem when taking Battle-shock test
upgradePath.PREDATORY_SENSES: Re-roll Hit rolls of 1 for ranged attacks
upgradePath.INDOMITABLE_STATURE: When ranged attack made against this unit — if attack Strength > unit Toughness, subtract 1 from Wound roll
upgradePath.SWEEPING_BLOW: Critical Wound inflicts 1 mortal wound in addition to normal damage

stridingBehemothsPath.unlocking: Same as Monster Hunters — 10 Tyrannic War Veteran points to progress

tyrannicWarVeteranRequisition.requirement: Unit must be Blooded rank or higher
tyrannicWarVeteranRequisition.effect: Unit gains TYRANNIC WAR VETERAN keyword and chosen upgrade path keyword. Gains starting Battle Honour for that path. Start Tyrannic War Veteran tally

artificer.CRIMSON_MEDALLION_OF_BASTIOR: At start of Command phase, if bearer within range of controlled objective — roll D6: on 4+, gain 1CP
artificer.BIOSPLINT_GLAND: When bearer's unit ends Charge move — select enemy within Engagement Range: until end of turn subtract 1 from their Hit rolls
artificer.ARTIFICER_WEAPON: Select weapon — on Critical Hit, target suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to normal damage

antiquity.SIGIL_OF_SOL: Once per battle round, if bearer on battlefield and you use Strategic Ploy Stratagem — use without spending CP
antiquity.CRANIUM_OBSCURA: Non-PSYKER only. Each time Psychic Attack targets bearer's unit — subtract 1 from Hit roll
antiquity.SHADESPLINTER_CLOAK: Unless part of Attached unit at battle start — has Lone Operative
antiquity.LANTERN_OF_DETESTATION: At start of opponent's Movement phase — for each non-IMPERIUM/CHAOS enemy within Engagement Range, roll D6: on 4+, cannot Fall Back until end of phase
antiquity.SHARD_OF_DYING_LIGHT: PSYKER only. +1 to Wound rolls for Psychic Attacks
antiquity.ARCHEOTECH_NANO_MED: INFANTRY only. First time bearer destroyed — roll D6 at end of phase instead of destruction triggers: on 4+, set bearer back up with D3 wounds

legendary.GHEIST_PRISM_FIELD: When making Normal/Advance/Fall Back — can move through models and terrain (cannot end on top). No Desperate Escape tests. After move, roll D6 for each enemy moved across: on 2+, D3 mortal wounds
legendary.VERTEBRAX_OF_VODUN: At start of Command phase, select one friendly model — select one Aura ability they have. Bearer has that Aura until next Command phase
legendary.VORTEX_GRENADE: Once per battle — if hit scored, roll D6 for each unit within 6" of target: on 4+, D3 mortal wounds. Target suffers 3D3 mortal wounds
legendary.NULL_FIELD_DISRUPTOR: Each time bearer makes melee attack — invulnerable saves cannot be made

campaignPhases.structure: Players form alliances (Defenders, Invaders, Raiders) and fight for Campaign points

crusadeBlessings.description: Underdogs (lower total Crusade points) gain Crusade Blessings based on difference

blessings.PREPARED_POSITIONS: Until round 2, ranged attacks against units wholly in own deployment zone give Benefit of Cover
blessings.WHAT_DOESNT_KILL_YOU: At end of battle, every non-destroyed unit gains 1XP
blessings.CRITICAL_STRIKE: Once per battle at start of Charge phase — +1 to Charge rolls until end of phase
blessings.OUTMANOEUVRE: At start of round 1, up to 3 units gain Scouts 6" for this battle
blessings.DEDICATION_TO_THE_CAUSE: Once per turn, re-roll one Battle-shock test
blessings.MASS_DEVOURING: TYRANIDS only — if half or more enemy units destroyed/Below Half-strength, gain 1RP. All destroyed/Below Half-strength = 3RP
blessings.HELLFIRE_SHELLS: Non-TYRANIDS only — select one unit: can re-roll Wound rolls against MONSTER or VEHICLE for this battle

agendas: BATTLEFIELD_SURVIVORS — 2XP per selected non-destroyed unit, +1XP if not Below Half-strength
SWARM_THE_PLANET — TYRANIDS only — 2XP per unit in table quarters where you outnumber opponent
HEADHUNTERS — 2XP per CHARACTER destroyed, 4XP for WARLORD
MONSTROUS_TARGETS — 2XP per MONSTER/VEHICLE destroyed (not DEDICATED TRANSPORTS), 4XP if TITANIC
ERADICATE_THE_SWARM — 1XP each time 6+ enemy models destroyed in one shoot/fight selection
CRITICAL_OBJECTIVES — 2XP per unit within range of two opponent-selected objectives at battle end
DRIVE_HOME_THE_BLADE — 3XP per unit within 6" of opponent's battlefield edge
CLEANSE_INFESTATION — 2XP per unit tasked to cleanse infested objective they control at end of turn
FORWARD_OBSERVERS — 2XP + 1CP if unit in opponent's deployment zone at end of opponent's next turn
RECOVER_MISSION_ARCHIVES — 1XP or 2XP + 1CP for controlling non-deployment zone objective
MALEFIC_HUNTER — 1XP per PSYKER or SYNAPSE unit destroyed (+1XP if CHARACTER)
